catalogData.name: Life
properties: Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Aid Healing
powers.raw: Aid Healing (Interrupt Action): +Force to magical healing tests (does not apply to Drain), and can target healing magic through spirit.
powers.text: +Force to magical healing tests (does not apply to Drain), and can target healing magic through spirit.

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Cast Spell
powers.raw: Cast Spell (Complex Action): Cast Cure Disease at Force/2

powers.name: Primary Spell
powers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action): Cast Antidote, Heal, or Treat at Force
powers.text: Cast Antidote, Heal, or Treat at Force

powers.name: Skill Guidance
powers.raw: Skill Guidance (Complex Action, Sustained): Target gains +2 augmentation bonus to Biotech if unaugmented skill ≤ Force
powers.text: Target gains +2 augmentation bonus to Biotech if unaugmented skill ≤ Force

powers.name: Stunbolt
powers.raw: Stunbolt (Complex Action): Cast Powerbolt at Force/2, but can only do Stun damage
powers.text: Cast Powerbolt at Force/2, but can only do Stun damage

greatFormPowers.name: Restrain
greatFormPowers.raw: Restrain (Complex Action): Cast Paralyze at Force, don't sustain. Ends if target takes damage.
greatFormPowers.text: Cast Paralyze at Force, don't sustain. Ends if target takes damage.
